name: build-demo-page
description: Builds the 'Alchemize Forge Demo' page — a polished 6-section showcase demonstrating the full preset system. Uses all wrapper presets (hero-dark, light-section, content-section, cta-banner), heading presets (hero, section-title, card-title), paragraph presets (lead, caption), card presets (elevated, dark), and individual prop overrides alongside presets. Most comprehensive preset example in the project.
preconditions: Active default theme has SDC components registered in Canvas
